allow: Bash(node -e "const fs = require\('fs'\); const buf = fs.readFileSync\('.env'\); const hex = buf.slice\(0,4\).toString\('hex'\); console.log\('Primeros bytes hex:', hex\); const lines = buf.toString\('utf8'\).split\('\\n'\); lines.forEach\(\(l,i\) => { if\(l.includes\('DATABASE'\)\) console.log\('Linea', i, JSON.stringify\(l\)\); }\)")
